title: Approvals Integration
excerpt: Would be great to integrate an approvals feature to boards/groups/items/subitems. If you could assign approvals to multiple users on files that are uploaded, it would be great to help traffic jobs through the platform an…

posts.author: sierratao (Sierra Taoatao)
posts.cookedHtml:
Would be great to integrate an approvals feature to boards/groups/items/subitems. If you could assign approvals to multiple users on files that are uploaded, it would be great to help traffic jobs through the platform and make it a true project management platform…

Right now the process to do some is pretty convoluted and far from seamless. I needed to put around 8 automations in to get it to kind of work. Would love if Monday could just support this without needing set up several automations.
